title: helichrysum quartinianum
intro: Helichrysum quartinianum, also known as the yellow cushion or yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the mountains of South Africa, where it grows in well-drained soil and full sun. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum quartinianum, such as essential oils and infusions, have been used to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function.
